Operation 'getScansList' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination, return fields, filtering capabilities, and how to use the results. Added context about what data is returned and how to use scan IDs for follow-up operations to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Provides all scans list for a specific account.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all scans for an account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all scans for a specific cloud account. Returns scan metadata including scan ID, status, timestamp, and resource count. Supports filtering and sorting by scan parameters. Use scan IDs to retrieve detailed scan results.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination, return fields, filtering capabilities, and how to use the results. Added context about what data is returned and how to use scan IDs for follow-up operations to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'scanResources' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions deprecation but doesn't clearly explain the asynchronous nature and expected workflow. Added clarity about immediate response with scan ID, background execution, and how to retrieve results. Included context about scan duration to help AI agents manage expectations and determine appropriate follow-up actions.

data.current_description:
This API operation is deprecated, please use [Scan cloud resources](#tag/Scans/operation/scanFunctionResources) instead.

Initiates an asynchronous scan on a list of cloud resources.
Discovers vulnerabilities for each scanned resource. Use the scan ID in the response to Get Scan.
data.description_suggestion: DEPRECATED: Use scanFunctionResources instead. Initiates an asynchronous scan on a list of cloud resources to discover vulnerabilities. Returns a scan ID immediately; the scan executes in the background. Use the returned scan ID with getScansList or getSpecificScanResults to retrieve vulnerability findings. Scanning may take several minutes depending on resource count.
data.reasoning: Description mentions deprecation but doesn't clearly explain the asynchronous nature and expected workflow. Added clarity about immediate response with scan ID, background execution, and how to retrieve results. Included context about scan duration to help AI agents manage expectations and determine appropriate follow-up actions.

message: Operation 'getSpecificResults' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is vague and doesn't indicate the specific nature of results. Description mentions filtering capability but lacks details about what vulnerability data is returned. Added specificity about severity, type, and remediation information to help AI agents understand the response structure and determine if this operation provides needed data.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of vulnerabilities for a cloud resource on a specific scan. Can filter by scanId and/or resourceId.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve vulnerabilities for a scanned resource
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of vulnerabilities discovered for a specific cloud resource within a particular scan. Returns vulnerability details including severity, type, affected function/component, and remediation guidance. Requires both scanId and resourceId parameters. Results are filtered to the specified resource and scan context.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague and doesn't indicate the specific nature of results. Description mentions filtering capability but lacks details about what vulnerability data is returned. Added specificity about severity, type, and remediation information to help AI agents understand the response structure and determine if this operation provides needed data.

message: Operation 'getResourceScanResults' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is acceptable but description is too minimal. Original description doesn't explain that results are aggregated across scans or what data fields are included. Added context about severity levels, scan history aggregation, and use case for tracking remediation to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation versus scan-specific results.

data.current_description: Get scan results for a specific cloud resource
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all vulnerability scan results for a specific cloud resource across all scans. Returns a list of vulnerabilities with severity levels, vulnerability types, and scan timestamps. Aggregates results from multiple scans to show the resource's vulnerability history. Useful for tracking remediation progress over time.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is too minimal. Original description doesn't explain that results are aggregated across scans or what data fields are included. Added context about severity levels, scan history aggregation, and use case for tracking remediation to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation versus scan-specific results.

message: Operation 'getSpecificScanResults' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Both summary and description are too vague and lack specificity. Original description doesn't clarify scope (all scans vs. specific scan), return data structure, or filtering capabilities. Added context about aggregation across scans, severity information, pagination support, and use cases to help AI agents understand this is for account-level reporting rather than scan-specific results.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of vulnerabilities for an account.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all vulnerabilities for an account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all vulnerabilities discovered across all scans for a specific account. Returns aggregated vulnerability data including severity levels, affected resources, vulnerability types, and scan timestamps. Supports filtering and pagination for large result sets. Use this for account-wide vulnerability reporting and risk assessment.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description are too vague and lack specificity. Original description doesn't clarify scope (all scans vs. specific scan), return data structure, or filtering capabilities. Added context about aggregation across scans, severity information, pagination support, and use cases to help AI agents understand this is for account-level reporting rather than scan-specific results.

message: Operation 'scanFunctionResources' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Original summary 'Scan cloud resources' is too generic and doesn't specify the resource type (functions). Description lacks clarity about input format (list of functions), output structure (scan ID), and how to use the returned ID. Enhanced version specifies function-level scanning, clarifies inputs/outputs, and explains the asynchronous workflow for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Initiates an asynchronous scan on a list of cloud resources. The scan discovers vulnerabilities for each cloud resource. This operation will return a scan ID which you can use to get [Scan details](#tag/Scans/operation/getScanDetails).
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate asynchronous scan on multiple functions
data.description_suggestion: Initiates an asynchronous scan on a list of serverless functions to discover vulnerabilities. Accepts a list of function identifiers as input. Returns a scan ID that can be used to retrieve scan details and results. The scan runs asynchronously; use the returned scan ID with getScanDetails to monitor progress and retrieve vulnerability findings.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Scan cloud resources' is too generic and doesn't specify the resource type (functions). Description lacks clarity about input format (list of functions), output structure (scan ID), and how to use the returned ID. Enhanced version specifies function-level scanning, clarifies inputs/outputs, and explains the asynchronous workflow for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'scanResource' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary lacks specificity about the action (initiate scan) and resource scope. Description is too brief and missing critical details about inputs (function identifier), outputs (scan ID), and vulnerability types discovered. Enhanced version clarifies the asynchronous nature, specifies what vulnerabilities are detected, and explains how to retrieve results for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Initiates an asynchronous scan on a specific lambda function.
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate asynchronous scan on single function
data.description_suggestion: Initiates an asynchronous scan on a specific Lambda function to discover vulnerabilities including permissions, dependencies, exploits, and CVEs. Requires the function identifier as input. Returns a scan ID that can be used to retrieve detailed scan results and vulnerability findings. The scan executes asynchronously; use the returned scan ID with getScanDetails to monitor progress.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about the action (initiate scan) and resource scope. Description is too brief and missing critical details about inputs (function identifier), outputs (scan ID), and vulnerability types discovered. Enhanced version clarifies the asynchronous nature, specifies what vulnerabilities are detected, and explains how to retrieve results for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getFunctions' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is contradictory - 'Get all functions filtered by a specific function ID' is unclear about whether it returns one or multiple functions. Missing details about response structure and available filter options. Enhanced version clarifies the filtering behavior, specifies what function metadata is returned, and explains the dual-mode functionality (single or multiple functions) for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Get all functions filtered by a specific function ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all serverless functions for a specific cloud account, optionally filtered by function ID. Returns a list of function objects containing metadata such as function name, runtime, memory configuration, and last scan results. Supports filtering to retrieve a specific function or all functions in the account.
data.reasoning: Description is contradictory - 'Get all functions filtered by a specific function ID' is unclear about whether it returns one or multiple functions. Missing details about response structure and available filter options. Enhanced version clarifies the filtering behavior, specifies what function metadata is returned, and explains the dual-mode functionality (single or multiple functions) for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getFunctionById' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too generic and lack specificity. 'Get function details' doesn't indicate what details are returned or their relevance. Enhanced version specifies the function object structure, includes relevant metadata fields, and clarifies the scope of returned information for better AI agent understanding of available data.

data.current_description: Get function details
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for specific function
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific serverless function including metadata, configuration, runtime information, and associated scan results. Returns a function object with properties such as function name, runtime, memory allocation, handler, last modified timestamp, and vulnerability scan history.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and lack specificity. 'Get function details' doesn't indicate what details are returned or their relevance. Enhanced version specifies the function object structure, includes relevant metadata fields, and clarifies the scope of returned information for better AI agent understanding of available data.

message: Operation 'getScannedResources' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about what resource details are returned and how the information can be used. Enhanced version specifies the response structure (resource identifiers, status, vulnerability counts), clarifies the resource type (functions), and explains practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Lists the resources evaluated for a specific scan. This helps identify areas of interest.
data.description_suggestion: Lists all cloud resources (functions) that were evaluated during a specific scan. Returns detailed information about each scanned resource including resource identifier, scan status, vulnerability count by severity, and scan timestamp. Useful for understanding scan coverage and identifying resources with detected vulnerabilities.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about what resource details are returned and how the information can be used. Enhanced version specifies the response structure (resource identifiers, status, vulnerability counts), clarifies the resource type (functions), and explains practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Provides all scans list for a specific account.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all scans for an account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all scans for a specific cloud account. Returns scan metadata including scan ID, status, timestamp, and resource count. Supports filtering and sorting by scan parameters. Use scan IDs to retrieve detailed scan results.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination, return fields, filtering capabilities, and how to use the results. Added context about what data is returned and how to use scan IDs for follow-up operations to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'scanResources' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions deprecation but doesn't clearly explain the asynchronous nature and expected workflow. Added clarity about immediate response with scan ID, background execution, and how to retrieve results. Included context about scan duration to help AI agents manage expectations and determine appropriate follow-up actions.

data.current_description:
This API operation is deprecated, please use [Scan cloud resources](#tag/Scans/operation/scanFunctionResources) instead.

Initiates an asynchronous scan on a list of cloud resources.
Discovers vulnerabilities for each scanned resource. Use the scan ID in the response to Get Scan.
data.description_suggestion: DEPRECATED: Use scanFunctionResources instead. Initiates an asynchronous scan on a list of cloud resources to discover vulnerabilities. Returns a scan ID immediately; the scan executes in the background. Use the returned scan ID with getScansList or getSpecificScanResults to retrieve vulnerability findings. Scanning may take several minutes depending on resource count.
data.reasoning: Description mentions deprecation but doesn't clearly explain the asynchronous nature and expected workflow. Added clarity about immediate response with scan ID, background execution, and how to retrieve results. Included context about scan duration to help AI agents manage expectations and determine appropriate follow-up actions.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of vulnerabilities for a cloud resource on a specific scan. Can filter by scanId and/or resourceId.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve vulnerabilities for a scanned resource
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of vulnerabilities discovered for a specific cloud resource within a particular scan. Returns vulnerability details including severity, type, affected function/component, and remediation guidance. Requires both scanId and resourceId parameters. Results are filtered to the specified resource and scan context.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague and doesn't indicate the specific nature of results. Description mentions filtering capability but lacks details about what vulnerability data is returned. Added specificity about severity, type, and remediation information to help AI agents understand the response structure and determine if this operation provides needed data.

message: Operation 'scanFunctionResources' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. data.current_description: Initiates an asynchronous scan on a list of cloud resources. The scan discovers vulnerabilities for each cloud resource. This operation will return a scan ID which you can use to get [Scan details](#tag/Scans/operation/getScanDetails).
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate asynchronous scan on multiple functions
data.description_suggestion: Initiates an asynchronous scan on a list of serverless functions to discover vulnerabilities. Accepts a list of function identifiers as input. Returns a scan ID that can be used to retrieve scan details and results. The scan runs asynchronously; use the returned scan ID with getScanDetails to monitor progress and retrieve vulnerability findings.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Scan cloud resources' is too generic and doesn't specify the resource type (functions). Description lacks clarity about input format (list of functions), output structure (scan ID), and how to use the returned ID. Enhanced version specifies function-level scanning, clarifies inputs/outputs, and explains the asynchronous workflow for better AI agent understanding.
